---
format: pdf
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

import pandas as pd
from great_tables import GT, loc
```

## Summary Rows (bottom) + Grand Summary (bottom)

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

df = pd.DataFrame(
    {
        "group": ["Alpha", "Alpha", "Beta", "Beta"],
        "row": ["a1", "a2", "b1", "b2"],
        "x": [10, 20, 30, 40],
        "y": [100, 200, 300, 400],
    }
)

print(
    GT(df, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="Summary Rows (bottom/bottom)")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="bottom",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="bottom",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```

## Summary Rows (top) + Grand Summary (top)

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

print(
    GT(df, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="Summary Rows (top/top)")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```

## Summary Rows (top) + Grand Summary (bottom)

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

print(
    GT(df, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="Summary Rows (top/bottom)")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="bottom",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```

## Summary Rows (bottom) + Grand Summary (top)

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

print(
    GT(df, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="Summary Rows (bottom/top)")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="bottom",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```

## Summary with row_group_as_column

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

df_lg = pd.DataFrame(
    {
        "group": ["Alpha", "Alpha", "Beta", "Beta", "", ""],
        "row": ["a1", "a2", "b1", "b2", "c1", "c2"],
        "x": [10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60],
        "y": [100, 200, 300, 400, 500, 600],
    }
)

print(
    GT(df_lg, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="row_group_as_column + summary (bottom/top)")
    .tab_stubhead(label="ID")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .tab_options(row_group_as_column=True)
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="bottom",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```

## Summary with row_group_as_column (top/top)

```{python}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

print(
    GT(df_lg, rowname_col="row", groupname_col="group")
    .tab_header(title="row_group_as_column + summary (top/top)")
    .tab_stubhead(label="ID")
    .tab_spanner(label="Values", columns=["x", "y"])
    .tab_options(row_group_as_column=True)
    .summary_rows(
        fns={"Sum": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .grand_summary_rows(
        fns={"Grand Total": lambda df: df.sum(numeric_only=True)},
        side="top",
    )
    .as_latex()
)
```
